The '''Hero's Cross''', also known as the '''Cross of Heroes,''' was a military medal awarded in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] military during the time of the [[Old Sith Wars]].

[[Sunry]] was awarded the Cross for his actions in the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1stm}}
